brand.name: Riverbed
brand.value_prop: Riverbed traces every request across services without manual instrumentation. Open-source agent, hosted query plane, $0 to start.

spec.notes: Design reference: linear.app, attio.com, stripe.com. Lots of whitespace, 1px borders on cards (no shadows), single accent color from the palette, pale off-white backgrounds. Avoid centered-on-everything; use generous left-aligned hero typography. Hero takes ~70vh on first paint. Riverbed's tone: "Observability that follows the request" — keep copy crisp, benefit-led, no jargon.
